summary: Lane HC-004 completed: Dead code removal sweep across packages/desktop/src/main/. Removed 13 dead exports from 8 files: ipc.ts (3), ipc-locale.ts (1), app-config.ts (4), constants.ts (3), logging.ts (1), menu-app.ts (1), store.ts (1), server.ts (1). Typecheck passes with zero regressions (all errors pre-existing in ../app/src/ test files). Key removals: sendSqliteMigrationProgress (unused after SQLite migration removal), getStoredLocale re-export (nothing imported it), getHealthEndpoint/getCustomProtocol/getAppIdentity/getAppIdentityForPlatform (unused platform-abstraction functions from DC-001 never wired up), SETTINGS_STORE/setConfigPlatformPaths/updaterEnabledForPlatform (unused exports), tail() (unused), BrowserWindow import in menu-app.ts (unused), setStorePlatformPaths (unused), WslConfig export (made internal).
